reasoning: Koren, we're focusing on improving your lactate clearance and aerobic base with over-unders designed to simulate the demands of the Alpine Loop. Your last ride showed a solid base but a need to push closer to race intensity, especially on sustained climbs.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x (12 min 209-223W @ Sweet Spot, 3 min 242-256W @ Threshold), simulate changes in grade like Emigration Canyon.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
